reason: Successfully sent a message to the agent and received a correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the agent list in sidebar and main area
Clicked on "QA-20260622-204434-7yrm" agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to the agent's home page
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" in the top right corner, which meets the requirement
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message was successfully typed and visible in the input
Clicked Send button to send the message — Message was sent and the page transitioned to a new chat session, status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response — Response received within 5 seconds (much faster than the 3-minute timeout)
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "2 + 2 = 4", the session was auto-renamed to "Basic Math Question Session", and the agent status returned to "idle"
